text:
There was once an old lady named Olive. Everyone loved Olive. But one summer evening something terrible happened.

Olive cooked herself supper. Something smelled good.

She decided to grill herself dinner. She bit right into the cheese.

She giggled. That was fun.

Suddenly it grew dark.

Olive knew birds. They wouldn't eat mice. She'd probably die.

Whispers drifted her way. Maybe a pet.

She got sleepy fast.

That night Olive dreamed. She found herself lost. It was rainy. A dog.

That dog was hers.

She petted it. Said sorry again.

It followed. Now many.

They roamed. They ran.

They flew.

Maybe she'd keep them.

Would they save her?
